title: The children’s social care (CSC) private dashboard early adopter scheme
body: "The CSC private dashboard early adopter scheme: participating local authorities documentation sets out:   which local authorities have been selected to take part in the early adopter scheme what they will do the phases they will undertake   The grant determination letter was sent to local authorities who successfully applied for funding.  At this stage, grant determination letters have only been issued to phase 1 local authorities.  The letter:   outlines the purpose of the grant lists successful local authorities and their funding amounts sets out expectations of the grant and funding allocations for the respective financial years   "
